About Me

Real Results.
Real Websites.

I'm Ayezha Butt, an SEO Specialist from Quetta, Pakistan with hands-on experience building, optimizing, and scaling live websites from zero to thousands of daily clicks — with GSC proof for every result.

I built an Arabic tool-based site from scratch, grew it to 3,000+ daily clicks and 5.28M impressions using on-page SEO alone, ranked it on Google Page 1, and flipped it for PKR 2,00,000 in 5 months. I grew a UK client site from 90 to 1,700+ clicks/day in just 2 months.

I specialize in AI Search Optimization — optimizing content for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini. I implement schema markup on every post for rich snippets and higher CTR.

What I Offer

Services

End-to-end SEO for businesses that want real organic growth — not just rankings.

🔍

On-Page SEO Optimization

Complete setup — H1/H2/H3, meta titles & descriptions, internal linking, WebP images, schema markup, mobile optimization, and GSC-based content updates.

⚙️

Technical SEO Audit

Full audit using Screaming Frog + Ahrefs — crawl errors, broken links, indexing issues, redirect chains, Core Web Vitals, and structured data validation.

🤖

AI Search Optimization

Optimizing content for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini. AEO, GEO, entity SEO, FAQ structuring, and prompt-aware content.

📝

SEO Content Strategy

Keyword research, grouping, topic clusters, content briefs, competitor gap analysis, and search intent mapping — a complete roadmap to dominate your niche.

📊

Schema Markup Implementation

Article, FAQ, HowTo, BreadcrumbList on every post to enhance rich snippets, boost CTR, and increase SERP visibility.

🌐

WordPress SEO Setup

Full WordPress optimization — RankMath, site architecture, URL structure, image pipeline, internal linking framework, and publishing workflow.
